title: Super Gamemode Switcher
description: A Server Tool to allow switching gamemodes without Operator. Customizable selections & Spectator Glowing
body:
# Super Gamemode Switcher
Super Gamemode Switcher is a Datapack/Mod that allows you to have Players change gamemodes without Operator Privileges. This is uses /trigger commands to change gamemodes allowing you to let players be any gamemode with toggles to turn them on and off! In addition you can enable glowing for spectators.
### Usecases?
Using a vanilla or lightly modded server can become a problem with permissions and allowing players to play a certain way. For example if you have a Creative server, normally players will have to play in only creative. This is especially useful if you run a Snapshot surver!

## Commands
_Commands used in this Datapack/mod_

- `/trigger GMSettings` | While can be ran by any player, Settings allows for Operators to toggle on/off any Gamemode, or Spectator Glowing. More Information Below

- `/trigger Creative` | Alias of `/trigger GMC`
- `/trigger Spectator` | Alias of `/trigger GMSP`
- `/trigger Survival` | Alias of `/trigger GMS`
- `/trigger Adventure` | Alias of `/trigger GMA`

## Super Gamemode Switcher Settings
Settings are divided up into 5 sections.
- `Spectator Glow`: Spectators invisible head glows for other Spectators. Does not affect players in other gamemodes. | OFF By Default
- `Creative Mode`: Sets the player who ran it into Creative Mode. | ON By Default
- `Spectator Mode`: Sets the player who ran it into Spectator Mode. | ON By Default
- `Survival Mode`: Sets the player who ran it into Survival Mode. | ON By Default
- `Adventure Mode`: Sets the player who ran it into Adventure Mode Mode. | ON By Default
